## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Enter `...`
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message if available.

| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 15 / Windows 11 |
